bids.reasoning: At t=0.0 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting my maximum-utility bid. The opponent opened with all valueD, which is the lowest utility for me on every issue and gives no evidence yet of willingness to make balanced concessions.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid because it is still extremely early at t=0.02, so there is little reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent has improved their offer slightly for me by moving issueA from valueD to valueC, but their bids are still far from attractive, so I will only concede on my lowest-weight issueD while holding firm on the more important issues.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.95 because it is still very early at t=0.04, so there is little reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent has improved only on issueA while keeping issueB, issueC, and issueD at my worst values, so I will hold firm on the more important issues and concede slightly on the least important issueD.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.92 because it is still very early at t=0.06, so there is little need for major concessions yet. The opponent has steadily conceded on issueA up to my top value while holding issueB, issueC, and issueD at valueD, so I will hold firm on the high-weight issues A/B/C and concede only the lowest-weight issueD to valueD.

I am still targeting a high-utility bid because it is very early in the negotiation, while avoiding an exact repeat of my last offer. The opponent’s offers have been conceding substantially on issueA and slightly on issueB, but they are still holding issueC and issueD at my least-preferred values, so I will concede only on a lower-importance issue while holding firm on issueA, issueB, and issueC.

At t=0.10 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.92 while making a concession on my lowest-weight issueD. The opponent’s offers have steadily improved for me on issueA and issueB, but they continue to hold issueC and issueD at valueD, so I will concede issueD while holding firm on the more important issues.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.866, since it is still early at t=0.12 and there is no need to concede too much yet. The opponent’s offers show steady concession on issueA and issueB, now matching my top values there, while still holding issueC and issueD at valueD; I will keep my high-weight issues firm and make a modest concession on issueC while leaving issueD already conceded.

I am targeting a high utility bid of about 0.893 because it is still early at t=0.14, so there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent’s offers have steadily improved for me, especially on issueA and issueB, and their latest bid concedes issueC to valueC while holding issueD at valueD; I will concede somewhat on lower-weight issueC but avoid repeating my exact previous bid.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.92 by holding firm on the most important issues A and B while also keeping C at my top value. The opponent has been steadily conceding toward my preferences, with their latest offer already reaching issueA/valueA, issueB/valueA, issueC/valueB, so at t=0.16 there is still room to press for issueC/valueA while conceding the low-weight issueD.

The opponent has steadily conceded from all valueD to issueA/valueA, issueB/valueA, and issueC/valueB, bringing their latest offer to a high utility for me. Since time is still early at t=0.18, I do not need to fully accept their latest position yet; I will target about 0.893 utility by holding my high-weight issues A and B at valueA, accepting issueC at valueB, and asking for a small improvement on low-weight issueD to valueC.

I am targeting a high but realistic utility around 0.893, since it is still early at t=0.20 and there is no need to concede all the way to the opponent’s latest offer yet. The opponent has steadily conceded on issueA and issueB to my top values and is now mainly pushing concessions on issueC/issueD, so I concede on lower-weight issueD while holding strong on the higher-weight issues.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.92 because it is still early, while conceding the lowest-weight issueD to valueD since the opponent repeatedly offers that. The opponent has steadily conceded on issueA and issueB to my best values, so I will hold firm there and test whether giving issueD helps them move on issueC.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.893, since it is still early enough at t=0.24 to avoid dropping straight to the opponent’s best prior offer. The opponent has conceded substantially on issueA and issueB and has oscillated on issueC/issueD, so I hold firm on the high-weight issues while making a moderate concession on issueC and only a small concession on issueD.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.92 because it is still early at t=0.26 and there is no need to concede down to the opponent’s latest offer yet.
